title: Prisma Cloud - Find Azure Resource by FQDN v2
content:
Find Azure resources by FQDN using Prisma Cloud inventory.
Supported services: Azure VM, Azure Load Balancer, Azure Application Gateway, AKS, Azure Web Apps, Azure Storage.

Cortex XSOAR/XSIAM SOAR playbook from the Cortex XSOAR pack (PrismaCloud, xsoar-supported).

Inputs — FQDN: FQDN to look up.; AzureDomains: A comma-separated list of Azure domains..

Outputs — PrismaCloud.Attribution: Prisma Cloud attributed asset information..

Integrations/scripts used: PrismaCloud v2, PrismaCloudAttribution, SetAndHandleEmpty.
raw_yaml:
description: |
  Find Azure resources by FQDN using Prisma Cloud inventory.
  Supported services: Azure VM, Azure Load Balancer, Azure Application Gateway, AKS, Azure Web Apps, Azure Storage.
id: Prisma Cloud - Find Azure Resource by FQDN v2
inputs:
- description: FQDN to look up.
  key: FQDN
  playbookInputQuery:
  required: true
  value: {}
- description: A comma-separated list of Azure domains.
  key: AzureDomains
  playbookInputQuery:
  required: false
  value:
    simple: .azure.com,.azurewebsites.net,.windows.net,.azmk8s.io
name: Prisma Cloud - Find Azure Resource by FQDN v2
outputs:
- contextPath: PrismaCloud.Attribution
  description: Prisma Cloud attributed asset information.
  type: unknown

          transformers:

              groups:
                value:

              keys:

            operator: RegexGroups
